author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Bluey's Quest for the Gold Pen – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play Bluey's Quest for the Gold Pen now on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/blueys-quest-for-the-gold-pen-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1021-01&utm_id=P1021-01 

When Dad yoinks the Gold Pen Bluey needs to finish her drawing, Bluey and her family are swept into a world of fun and adventure. Hand-drawn worlds, hidden treasures, and playful puzzles await in this original story written by the show's creator Joe Brumm!  

#NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoSwitch #BlueysQuestfortheGoldPen

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Pictonico! – Launch Trailer
Pictonico! is available now on smart devices: https://pictonico.nintendo.com 

This collection of comically chaotic games will let you encounter your photos in surprising ways, like skydiving with your grandma or watching your cousin perform as a ballerina. Plus, you can save the outlandish outcomes you’ve discovered as images or videos. Share them with friends and family and laugh together! 
 
#Pictonico #Nintendo

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Donkey Kong 64 – Nintendo 64 – Nintendo Classics – Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack
Donkey Kong 64 is coming to Nintendo 64 – Nintendo Classics for Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack subscribers!

Cross isles with the Kongs as they face King K. Rool.

With his mechanical isle stuck off the shores of DK Island, K. Rool kidnaps the Kong family to distract Donkey Kong. It's up to our furry hero to rescue his friends, reclaim his Golden Bananas, and save his homeland from certain doom. Choose from five Kong members as you play solo in a quirky adventure or with friends in competitive battle arenas!

Join Donkey Kong, Diddy Kong, Tiny Kong, Lanky Kong, and Chunky Kong as they fight to keep DK Island safe and sound from K. Rool and his Kremling crew. Climb, swim, and jump with each of the five Kong members through treacherous and puzzling areas while taking advantage of their special
abilities and upgrades. Encounter friendly aid from other Kongs and a caged Kremling by the name of K. Lumsy. Hunt for collectibles and play wacky minigames while solo, or duke it out in battle arenas with friends in a four-player split-screen view. There's enough fun to go around to make you go bananas!

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
